creator: mkamm@gmx.net
text:
From maintainer:

Discovered a bug after submission. Since the PR is still in open state
it's easier to point to a corrected shar file than to submit a maintainer-update. Please take updated file from
http://mitglied.lycos.de/mkamm/distfiles/jline.SHAR
instead of the one attached to PR!

Thanks,
 Martin
